title: Coerver Ball Mastery 1
setupHtml: just some space and a ball (can be inside!)
instructionsHtml:
1. Toe Taps;
  2. Foundations;
  3. Triangles;
  4. Roll-in,
  5. Roll-out;
  6. Brazilians;
  7. Rollout, push in;
  8. Balance Circles;
  9. Sole-roll, tap-tap;
  10. Stepover, drag back, tap tap;
progressionsHtml: Learn moves 6-10 one by one and add them to the simpler moves with patience
emphasisHtml: Body balance, confidence with various touches, 1000 touch workouts
